zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Rothwell於1283年出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾提爾斯沃斯時，她的父親Richard Rothwell30歲，母親Alice Tillson23歲。她於大約1304年與John de Morteyn III在英國貝德福爾提爾斯沃斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1346年在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾特易福德享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Rothwell于1283年出生在英国英格兰貝德福爾提爾斯沃斯时，她的父亲Richard Rothwell30岁，母亲Alice Tillson23岁。她于大约1304年与John de Morteyn III在英国貝德福爾提爾斯沃斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1346年在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾特易福德享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rothwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of   Rowell  . This name was brought to Ireland (Meath) from England in the 17th century.

variants.name: Rowell
meanings: habitational name principally from Rothwell (Yorkshire), but Rothwell in Lincolnshire and Northamptonshire also gave rise to surnames. The placenames derive from Old English roth ‘clearing’ + wella ‘well, spring, stream’.
habitational name from Rowell in Chudleigh (Devon), named with Old English rūh ‘rough’ + hyll ‘hill’. The name may have been confused with Roll .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Rothwell was born in 1283, in Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard Rothwell, was 30 and her mother, Alice Tillson, was 23. She married John de Morteyn III about 1304, in Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1346, in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Rothwell est née en 1283, à Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Rothwell, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Alice Tillson, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé John de Morteyn III environ 1304, à Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1346, à Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Rothwell 1283 in Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Rothwell 30 und ihre Mutter Alice Tillson 23. Sie hat um 1304 in Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, England John de Morteyn III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1346 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Rothwell è nata il nel 1283 nel Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Richard Rothwell, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Alice Tillson, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato John de Morteyn III circa 1304, nel Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1346, nel Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Rothwellが1283年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアティルスウオルスで生まれた時，父Richard Rothwellは30歳，母Alice Tillsonは23歳であった。約1304年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアティルスウオルスでJohn de Morteyn IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1346年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアトウイフォードで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Rothwell(이)가 1283년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 틸스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Rothwell(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Tillson(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1304년 영국 베드퍼드실르 틸스워스에서 John de Morteyn III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1346년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 트w이퍼드에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Rothwell nasceu em 1283, em Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Rothwell, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Alice Tillson, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Morteyn III aproximadamente 1304, em Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1346, em Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Rothwell родилась в 1283 г. в местности тилсворт, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard Rothwell было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Tillson, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Morteyn III около 1304 г. в местности тилсворт, бедфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1346 г. в местности твифорд, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Rothwell nació en 1283, en Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Rothwell, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Alice Tillson, tenía 23 años. Se casó con John de Morteyn III aproximadamente 1304, en Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1346, en Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años.
